calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-07-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-07-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Carol Cullum, Esq. for Plaintiff: Mercy Services Corporation.
No appearance by the Defendant: Michael Hammer.
9:25 a.m.- Plaintiff's witness: Temia Graham was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1- Rental agreement ----------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Three day notice-----------------------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for restitution and possession of the premises located at 240 Jones St., #622, San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
No money judgment requested or granted.
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk Craig Blackstone, not reported (218)

Appearances: Plaintiff Mercy Services Corporation by Linda Rochelle with Carol Collum, Esquire; Defendant Michael Hammer in pro per.

Settlement conference held. Case does not settle. Trial date maintained. (D. 218)
